S.FORM: Italy Itini i 42 50 N, 12 50 E, noYoropi ko Italy. Polong no sekalay i 301,340 sq km "saka 72 ko rayray no ngangan. " "O sekalay no sera i, 294,140 sq km, no nanom a sekalay i, 7,200 sq km " Polong i 62,007,540 ko tamdaw. sera Masakilac ko sera o malo kakaomahen a sera 47.10%, Malo no kilakilangan a sera 31.40%, malo no roma to a sera 21.50%. siyoto O ko Siyoto. katomirengan no kitakit a romi'ad Pihiratengan no kitakit a romi'ad i sakaenem 2 a romi'ad. O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci Sergio Mattarella , patirengan a romi'ad i 2015 a miheca saka 2 folad saka 3 a romi'ad. Pi'arawan to lakaw CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®

S.FORM: Italy Itini i 42 50 N, 12 50 E, noYoropi ko Italy. Polong no sekalay i 301,340 sq km "saka 72 ko rayray no ngangan. " "O sekalay no sera i, 294,140 sq km, no nanom a sekalay i, 7,200 sq km " Polong i 62,007,540 ko tamdaw. sera Masakilac ko sera o malo kakaomahen a sera 47.10%, Malo no kilakilangan a sera 31.40%, malo no roma to a sera 21.50%. siyoto O ko Siyoto. katomirengan no kitakit a romi'ad Pihiratengan no kitakit a romi'ad i sakaenem 2 a romi'ad. O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci Sergio Mattarella , patirengan a romi'ad i 2015 a miheca saka 2 folad saka 3 a romi'ad. Pi'arawan to lakaw CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
